# cairn search

cairn.mcp.v1 verb: search

## Help

```text
cairn.mcp.v1 verb: search

Usage: search [OPTIONS] [query]

Arguments:
  [query]
          Free-text query string.

Options:
      --mode <ENUM>
          [possible values: keyword, semantic, hybrid]

      --limit <U32>


      --filters <JSON>


      --citations <ENUM>
          [possible values: on, compact, off]

      --cursor <STRING>


      --json
          Emit machine-readable JSON response envelope to stdout

  -h, --help
          Print help
```
